input.product: AI code review tool for engineering teams

page_structure.purpose: Grab attention with the core promise

page_structure.content: 3 pain points of manual code review (slow, inconsistent, blocking)
3-step process: Connect repo → AI reviews PRs → Team ships faster
50% faster reviews, 3x more PRs merged, 90% accuracy
Repeat hero CTA with urgency element

hero_section.headline: Ship Better Code, Faster
hero_section.subheadline: AI-powered code review that catches bugs, enforces standards, and unblocks your team — before humans even look at the PR.
hero_section.visual: Animated GIF showing AI review comments appearing on a GitHub PR

social_proof_strategy.above_fold: Logo bar with 5+ recognizable company logos
social_proof_strategy.mid_page: 3 testimonial cards with photo, name, company, quote
social_proof_strategy.near_cta: Trust badges: SOC 2, GitHub Marketplace verified

final.text: Start Free — No Credit Card Needed

objection_flow.method: Show customization: trains on YOUR style guide and patterns

objection_flow.objection: Will it slow down our workflow?
objection_flow.method: Show async: reviews happen in parallel, never blocking
Position as complementary: logic-level review, not just style
